seo.title: Thozhiya En Kadhaliya Lyrics Kadhalil Vizhundhen
seo.description: Full Thozhiya En Kadhaliya songs lyrics, Kadhalil Vizhundhen Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: P.V.Prasad., Music: Vijay Antony, Singer(s): Harish Ragavendra, Sricharan.
seo.keywords: P.V.Prasad., Kadhalil Vizhundhen, Vijay Antony, Harish Ragavendra, Sricharan, Thozhiya En Kadhaliya full lyrics, Kadhalil Vizhundhen songs lyrics, Thozhiya En Kadhaliya lyrics snippets, Thozhiya En Kadhaliya WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Thozhiya En Kadhaliya lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thozhiya En Kadhaliya, the protagonists express their deep affection and yearning for each other, encapsulating the bittersweet nature of love. The song plays a pivotal role in Kadhalil Vizhundhen, highlighting the emotional turmoil faced by the characters. With soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics by P.V. Prasad, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. The collaboration between Harish Ragavendra and Sricharan adds depth, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thozhiya En Kadhaliya from Kadhalil Vizhundhen beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Harish Ragavendra and Sricharan, this duet resonates with heartfelt emotions. The masterful composition by Vijay Antony adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: My friend, who is my love? My friend, who is my love?
You are sleeping on my lap, resting on my shoulder. If you come close, you will call me a friend, oh oh ho girl.
Why are you taking my life away? You are coming like a breeze, I am melting. You are making me love my own poetry.
Even in dreams, you come and touch my thoughts, I am breaking everything at night. You are the answer to my questions, you tell me what it is.
My friend, who is my love?
Yow. Let's get it now, just wanna give my heart to you. My love is true, wanna take you on this journey, you'll just be by my side.
No one gave it up, cool. Remember, because of you, just let me hold this, I'll make it true, true.
First, let me tell you who you are!! Girl, you...
I am standing in the rain waiting for a drop, you made me feel alive.
I am standing in the shade, you gave me happiness.
You gave me joy, making my eyes shine with happiness.
You gave flowers in the desert, you made heaven a reality.
I saw a dream in the dark, I saw it in the morning.
You gave me colors in the white light, and came to my side.
My friend, who is my love?
I am standing alone in the darkness, you made the little flowers bloom.
I was alone in the solitude, you gave me wings to fly.
I turned my tears into a beautiful flower, like a breeze.
I made my heart sing like a flower in the garden.
God does not come to the earth, he sent my mother here.
I have no mother here. If she comes to me, she will be my mother.
My friend, who is my love? My friend, who is my love?
You are sleeping on my lap, resting on my shoulder. If you come close, you will call me a friend, oh oh ho girl.
Why are you taking my life away? You are coming like a breeze, I am melting. You are making me love my own poetry.
Even in dreams, you come and touch my thoughts, I am breaking everything at night. You are the answer to my questions, you tell me what it is.
You are my friend..
